params.prompt: Super smooth camera travels in a slow arc around the main room feature, subject stays centered, parallax remains natural, consistent exposure, stable motion, cinematic, photorealistic. Slow orbital pan from the dining pass-through into the kitchen counter vignette, pause on the stoneware tray and potted herb, then tilt up slightly to show shelving. Keep camera movement gentle to emphasize tactile surfaces. Taste, Calm, warm, airy Japandi — family-forward, minimal, and texturally layered. Plausible light drift from visible sources only, consistent exposure, straight architecture, stable walls and windows, premium real-estate cinematography.
params.negative_prompt: No saturated or neon colors, no heavy ornamentation, no busy patterns, avoid glossy reflective plastics or chrome, no visible text/logos, avoid unrealistic lighting (hard mixed color temps), no unsafe crib staging (no cords, no hanging items)., blur, distort, low quality, warped architecture, flicker, unstable camera, unrealistic lighting, muddy shadows, layout drift
